semantic.role: Configuration type definitions and re-export module for the ArchSpine configuration system. Provides canonical type shapes for boolean setting resolution, supported config keys, sync modes, and artifact strategies, and re-exports the core SpineConfig type from the protocol layer.
responsibilities: Re-export the SpineConfig type from the protocol layer as the canonical configuration type for the entire system.
Define BooleanSettingResolution interface to capture how a boolean config value was resolved (value, source, and optional env variable name).
Define SupportedConfigKey type enumerating all valid configuration key strings for compile-time constraint.
Define HookSyncMode literal type restricted to 'hook'.
Define ArtifactStrategy literal union type of 'local' | 'distributable'.
outOfScope: No runtime logic such as loading, validation, or resolution of configuration values.
No environment variable parsing or I/O operations.
No dependency on specific configuration backends or providers.
invariants: All exports are pure type definitions (interfaces, type aliases, literal unions).
Imports are restricted to public protocol type modules, avoiding deep infra implementation paths.
No side effects on module load.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a single source of truth for configuration type shapes, enabling type-safe config access across the codebase without depending on implementation internals.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No direct code changes indicated in this file; the recent commit '4a6aac8' (release gate fixes) likely touched other modules.

publicSurface.description: Interface that records how a boolean configuration value was resolved, including the actual value, source (env, config, default), and optional env variable name. Consumed by config resolution logic to trace setting provenance.
Re-export of the canonical SpineConfig protocol type. Enables downstream modules to import the config type from the config module rather than directly from the protocol layer.
Literal type representing the sync mode for hooks. Currently restricted to 'hook'.
Literal union type representing the strategy for artifact management, either 'local' or 'distributable'.
Type that enumerates all supported configuration key strings. Used to constrain config access and validation at compile time.
